rationale: The notebook has an engaging premise around finding overlooked high-habitability exoplanets and combines feature engineering, clustering, anomaly detection, and an interactive candidate table. The story is interesting, but the core model is partly circular because it trains on synthetic habitability labels derived from the same handcrafted scores it later ranks, so the evidence is weaker than the presentation suggests. It is a solid exploratory notebook with useful visuals, but the rigor is moderate.
